codeReview.summary: Implementation fully satisfies the feature requirements. ObservableCommand interface with ≤5-line boilerplate comment, RegisterObservable function, middleware pattern in Execute() capturing all commands, --observe flag and MAPJ_OBSERVE=1 env var support, panic recovery in Observe(), and backward compatibility all implemented correctly.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker reported that 'backend-worker' skill specified in features.json does not exist in the available skills list. Worker proceeded without the skill and implemented the feature directly following requirements from mission.md and validation-contract.md.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback: 'followedProcedure: false' with deviation noting backend-worker skill does not exist. Suggestion: Consider adding 'backend-worker' skill or clarifying which existing skill should be used for backend/CLI features.

summary: Feature observability-plugin-architecture passes review. Implementation creates ObservableCommand interface with opt-in registration pattern. Middleware in Execute() captures all commands (both error and success paths). Panic recovery ensures Observe() never crashes commands. --observe flag and MAPJ_OBSERVE=1 env var enable observability. Backward compatible since existing commands don't need modification. All 7 unit tests pass. One non-blocking shared state observation about missing backend-worker skill.
